statement.en: Before the Diagnosis and Beyond: Understanding the Journey of Families affected by Young-Onset Dementia (YOD)

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a qualitative research work in progress (dated future, preprint status implied) examining lived experience of families with young-onset dementia. It is not a theorem or established fact, nor is it refuted. The work is empirical/exploratory, under validation, and represents provisional understanding of a complex social phenomenon. Classification as FLOWING reflects its status as emerging research requiring further validation and iteration.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 診断の瞬間がすべてを変え、その後の時間は二度と戻らない道を歩む確率の総和である。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 診断点から放射状に広がる多くの人生の経路。一つの判定が家族全体を別の世界へと導く分岐点である。
